hero.body: KEMET heavy machinery is engineered for operators who refuse to compromise — delivering exceptional power, precision, and reliability for projects across the world.

shipping.desc: Reliable delivery to any part of the world.

footer.brand_desc: Alpha Sino General Trading Co. L.L.C. — your trusted partner for premium heavy machinery across construction, mining, and industrial sectors worldwide.
footer.top_banner: TRUSTED PARTNER FOR HEAVY MACHINERY SOLUTIONS WORLDWIDE
footer.address: Dubai Airport Building, Office 104, Port Said Area, Dubai, UAE

advantages.heading: Power Without Compromise
advantages.power_desc: Every KEMET machine is engineered with high-torque powertrains and heavy-duty cooling packages designed to deliver sustained peak horsepower under continuous maximum load, ensuring zero power throttling in extreme desert and quarry environments.
advantages.precision_desc: Equipped with state-of-the-art load-sensing hydraulic systems and intelligent electronic flow-matching control to deliver sub-millimeter operational accuracy, critical for high-stakes infrastructure and complex mining grading.
advantages.reliability_desc: Built on rugged, high-tensile steel frames and backed by an ISO-certified manufacturing process and a comprehensive worldwide support network, ensuring maximum mechanical availability and minimized Total Cost of Ownership (TCO).

cta.heading: Ready To Power Your Next Project?
cta.summary: Our heavy machinery specialists are standing by worldwide to help you configure the perfect fleet for your operational requirements. Power without compromise.

showcase.excavators_desc: High-performance hydraulic excavators engineered for maximum digging depth, power, and efficiency in tough quarry and earthmoving conditions.
showcase.loaders_desc: Heavy-duty wheel loaders built for high-capacity material handling, rapid cycle times, and ultimate operator comfort.
showcase.tractors_desc: Industrial crawler bulldozers designed for heavy earth pushing, site clearing, and leveling on challenging terrains.
showcase.trucks_desc: High-payload mining dump trucks built to transport materials across rugged terrain with ultimate reliability.

catalog.summary: Every machine in the KEMET lineup is engineered for uncompromising performance, structural durability, and maximum mechanical uptime in extreme climates worldwide.
catalog.search_placeholder: Search by product name, model number, or category...
catalog.try_adjusting: Try adjusting your search or filters
catalog.promo_desc: Access full dimensional drawings, complete hydraulic schematics, engine performance curves, and custom attachment configurations in one high-resolution PDF.

about.heading: About Kemet & Alpha Sino
about.subheading: Building trusted industrial partnerships worldwide since 2003.
about.history_p1: Founded in Dubai's Port Said district, Alpha Sino General Trading Co. LLC began as a specialized importer of construction and mining equipment for the rapidly developing UAE market. Two decades of relationship-driven commerce transformed us into one of the world's most recognized heavy machinery distributors.
about.history_p2: The KEMET brand was born from a simple conviction: the global construction and mining sectors deserved purpose-engineered machinery that could withstand extreme heat, continuous heavy-cycle operations, and the logistical demands of remote project sites — without compromising operator productivity or machine reliability.
about.history_p3: Today, KEMET machines are deployed across construction megaprojects, open-pit mining operations, and industrial infrastructure developments worldwide.
about.strength_2_desc: Guaranteed genuine components for maximized machine uptime.
about.strength_3_desc: Dedicated technical support team active worldwide.

details.advisor_text: Our heavy equipment advisors respond within 2 hours with tailored quotes, shipping terms, and delivery timelines.

1.name: KL-950 Wheel Loader
1.description: Heavy-duty wheel loader engineered for high-capacity material handling and extreme industrial loading cycles.

2.name: KE-210 Hydraulic Excavator
2.description: Versatile hydraulic excavator designed for maximum digging efficiency, precision control, and low fuel consumption.

3.name: KG-160 Motor Grader
3.description: Precision motor grader with advanced blade control systems, built for high-stakes road construction and site leveling.

4.name: KM-450 Mining Dump Truck
4.description: High-payload heavy dump truck engineered to transport materials across rugged terrain with ultimate structural durability.

5.name: KT-160 Crawler Bulldozer
5.description: Heavy industrial crawler bulldozer engineered for aggressive site clearing, earth-pushing, and land reclamation.

6.name: KB-880 Backhoe Loader
6.description: Multi-purpose backhoe utility loader combining front bucket loading and rear excavating capability in a compact footprint.

7.name: KE-380 Mining Excavator
7.description: Heavy-duty crawler excavator engineered for sustained excavation cycles in open-pit mines and heavy quarry sites.

8.name: KG-180 Heavy Grader
8.description: High-horsepower motor grader designed for deep cut leveling and high-volume gravel grading on heavy infrastructure projects.

9.name: AR Series Agricultural Tractor
9.description: Versatile and efficient 20-30 HP agricultural tractor designed for modern farming needs. Built to work, built to last.
